title: Agent Clearing House + RefusalGraph
positioning_line: Before an agent says yes, it can check who already said no - and why.
one_sentence_explanation: A local draft pre-action clearing and receipt layer that uses RefusalGraph caution signals before risky agent requests are accepted.
future_value: Possible future receipt verification, refusal lookup, and clearance fee points remain disabled.
safety_statement: This is local draft material only. It is unpublished, uses no network, exposes no private data, moves no money, and executes no action.
